Ordinary differential equations (ODEs) and their applications, Modeling of biological processes (neuronal dynamics, cell electrophysiology) Partial Differential Equations (PDEs): Describing spatial and temporal variations in phenomena such as heat transfer in tissues and fluid flow in blood vessels
